title: Tool Calling Policy
description: Policy for LLM tool/function calling — fail-closed defaults.

enabled.description: Master switch. false = no tool calling (fail-closed default).

max_tool_calls_per_request.description: Max tool calls in a single LLM request.

allowed_tools.description: Tool allowlist. v3.9 B2 semantic: empty array = allowlist DISABLED (all registered tools permitted modulo blocked_tools); non-empty = strict fail-closed (only listed tools permitted). blocked_tools always overrides allowed_tools.

mutating_requires_confirmation.description: Mutating tools require human confirmation before dispatch.

max_identical_calls.description: Max times same tool+input can be called before blocking.

implicit_canonical_promote.description: Side-channel wiring: every MCP tool envelope may be scanned for high-confidence decisions and promoted to the canonical store. Subfields optional so legacy workspace overrides remain valid.

enabled.description: Master switch for the implicit promote path. Default true.

threshold.description: Minimum decision confidence required before promotion.

source_prefix.description: Source tag written for implicitly-promoted decisions.
